b1_level_start_darius_01.text: This is where Grandpa Aldric made his last dive. I can feel him down there. Let's go.
b1_level_start_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b1_level_start_ophion_01.text: The Guardian Coelacanth's signal is faint but stable, Darius. It may still recognize the Star genetic sequence.
b1_level_start_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b1_unique_enemy_darius_01.text: Anglerfish drones lighting up — those lures mean they've locked on. Break line of sight!
b1_unique_enemy_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b1_unique_enemy_ophion_01.text: Cybernetic jellyfish swarms — their bioelectric pulses can chain between ships. Maintain separation.
b1_unique_enemy_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b1_boss_entrance_darius_01.text: There it is... the Guardian. Grandpa, if you're still in there somewhere, I'm going to help you.
b1_boss_entrance_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b1_boss_entrance_ophion_01.text: The Guardian's recognition matrix is corrupted. It may attack before it identifies you. Be ready, Darius.
b1_boss_entrance_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b1_player_death_ophion_01.text: The pressure down here is relentless. But you carry Aldric's blood — you were built for this depth.
b1_player_death_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b1_player_death_darius_01.text: That one hurt. But Lyra's counting on me. I'm not done yet.
b1_player_death_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b1_player_respawn_ophion_01.text: Systems restored. The abyss tests everyone who enters it — and you've already proven your resolve.
b1_player_respawn_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b1_player_respawn_darius_01.text: Okay. Deep breath. Grandpa didn't give up at this depth, and neither will I.
b1_player_respawn_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b1_low_health_darius_01.text: Hull's buckling — this trench wants to crush us. Holding together!
b1_low_health_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b1_wave_clear_ophion_01.text: The hydrothermal vents are stabilizing. You fight with the precision of someone who knows these depths.
b1_wave_clear_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b1_level_end_darius_01.text: The Guardian recognized me. Grandpa's voice... I heard him, Ophion. We got GLYPH-1. Heading up.
b1_level_end_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b1_level_end_ophion_01.text: GLYPH-1 secured. The neural stabilizer will buy Lyra precious time. Well done, Darius.
b1_level_end_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b1_level_start_cross_01.text: Abyssal Trench. Your grandfather's last known coordinates. You ready for this, Star?
b1_level_start_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b1_level_start_darius_02.text: Ready as I'll ever be, Cross. Watch for those anglerfish lures in the dark.
b1_level_start_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b1_unique_enemy_cross_01.text: Jellyfish swarm at two o'clock — their pulses will chain through both of us if we drift too close!
b1_unique_enemy_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b1_unique_enemy_darius_02.text: I see them. Cross, take the left flank, I'll draw their fire. Standard Navy peel formation.
b1_unique_enemy_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b1_boss_entrance_darius_02.text: The Guardian's massive... but it's not attacking yet. It's scanning my biosignature.
b1_boss_entrance_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b1_boss_entrance_cross_01.text: It's reading your genetic code. Your grandfather's files weren't wrong — this thing knows your family.
b1_boss_entrance_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b1_player_death_cross_01.text: Star's down! He knew the risks coming here. I'm holding the line until he's back.
b1_player_death_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b1_player_death_darius_02.text: Cross, I'm out! The trench doesn't pull punches. Give me a minute.
b1_player_death_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b1_player_respawn_cross_01.text: Welcome back, Star. Your grandfather would've been proud — nobody shakes off the abyss that fast.
b1_player_respawn_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b1_player_respawn_darius_02.text: Thanks for covering me. Let's finish what Aldric started.
b1_player_respawn_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b1_low_health_cross_01.text: Darius, your hull integrity is critical. Pull back and let me take point.
b1_low_health_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b1_squad_save_darius_01.text: Nice shooting, Cross. You just saved my hull.
b1_squad_save_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b1_squad_save_cross_01.text: That one was headed right for you, Star. Eyes forward, I've got your six.
b1_squad_save_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b1_level_end_cross_01.text: GLYPH-1 secure. The Guardian stood down when it read your bloodline. That's not just luck, Darius.
b1_level_end_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b1_level_end_darius_02.text: It spoke with my grandfather's voice, Cross. He's still in there somehow. Let's get this to Lyra.
b1_level_end_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b1_level_start_naya_01.text: This is where Aldric vanished forty years ago. Darius... are you okay?
b1_level_start_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b1_level_start_darius_03.text: I'm fine, Naya. Having you all here makes it easier. Let's find the Guardian.
b1_level_start_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b1_level_start_ophion_02.text: Fascinating! The pressure readings suggest the crust here is thinner than expected. The Dreamer's influence may be seeping upward!
b1_level_start_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b1_level_start_cross_02.text: Ophion, save the geology lesson. Eyes on sensors — anglerfish patrol in pairs.
b1_level_start_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b1_unique_enemy_ophion_02.text: Oh! Those are anglerfish drones — the lure is sonar-based, not visual. It can track you through the mineral clouds!
b1_unique_enemy_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b1_unique_enemy_naya_01.text: Jellyfish bloom ahead. Everyone spread out — I've seen these chain-lightning patterns in old security footage.
b1_unique_enemy_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b1_boss_entrance_darius_03.text: There. The Guardian Coelacanth. It's bigger than the mission logs described...
b1_boss_entrance_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b1_boss_entrance_naya_01.text: Darius, its eye is tracking you specifically. It knows you're a Star.
b1_boss_entrance_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b1_boss_entrance_ophion_02.text: The recognition protocol is corrupted. I can attempt to broadcast Aldric's authorization codes, but it may trigger hostility!
b1_boss_entrance_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b1_boss_entrance_cross_02.text: Do it, Ophion. Better than shooting blind. Everyone, weapons hot but hold fire unless it engages.
b1_boss_entrance_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b1_player_death_naya_01.text: Darius! ...He's tough. He's come back from worse. Stay focused, squad.
b1_player_death_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b1_player_death_ophion_02.text: A temporary setback! The Nyxa's escape pod systems are remarkably robust for human engineering.
b1_player_death_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b1_player_respawn_darius_03.text: Still here. Thanks for holding the line, everyone.
b1_player_respawn_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b1_player_respawn_naya_01.text: Welcome back, love. Lyra would scold you for scaring us like that.
b1_player_respawn_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b1_low_health_naya_01.text: Honey, your ship is falling apart. Fall back behind Cross and me — now.
b1_low_health_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b1_squad_save_ophion_01.text: Naya, that was extraordinary! You intercepted four hostiles in under two seconds!
b1_squad_save_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b1_wave_clear_cross_01.text: Squad, formation held. Thorne, we're pushing deeper. The Guardian's signal is getting stronger.
b1_wave_clear_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b1_level_end_darius_03.text: I heard him. Aldric's voice, in the Guardian's final transmission. He was trying to warn us about the Navy all along.
b1_level_end_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b1_level_end_naya_01.text: We've got GLYPH-1. Lyra's going to get the treatment she needs. Let's go home.
b1_level_end_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b1_level_end_ophion_02.text: The Guardian's data core contained a complete star chart! The next entity is on Kepler-442b. Onward!
b1_level_end_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b2_level_start_darius_01.text: This whole reef is dead. The precursors destroyed their own colony here... to hide something.
b2_level_start_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b2_level_start_ophion_01.text: The memory-vault should be at the reef's center. Its defenses will test more than your weapons, Darius.
b2_level_start_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b2_unique_enemy_darius_01.text: Coral wasps! They're nesting in the bleached coral — don't let them surround you!
b2_unique_enemy_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b2_unique_enemy_ophion_01.text: Armored eels weaving through the structures. Their plating deflects frontal attacks. Aim for the segments.
b2_unique_enemy_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b2_boss_entrance_darius_01.text: What is that? It's not solid... it's made of memories. I can feel their grief.
b2_boss_entrance_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b2_boss_entrance_ophion_01.text: A Memory Wraith — a construct of collective death-echoes. It cannot be destroyed with firepower alone. Show it understanding.
b2_boss_entrance_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b2_player_death_ophion_01.text: The reef remembers every death. But it also remembers every birth. Return, Darius — there is still life here.
b2_player_death_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b2_player_death_darius_01.text: Those death-echoes hit hard. But I'm not joining them. Not today.
b2_player_death_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b2_player_respawn_ophion_01.text: Welcome back. The precursor vault awaits — and with it, the truth about my past self.
b2_player_respawn_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b2_player_respawn_darius_01.text: Alright. I've seen what the precursors lost. Now let's see what they left behind.
b2_player_respawn_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b2_low_health_darius_01.text: Hull's taking water. These coral structures scratch worse than Navy razor wire.
b2_low_health_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b2_wave_clear_ophion_01.text: The wasp swarm is thinning. You are learning to read this reef's rhythm.
b2_wave_clear_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b2_level_end_darius_01.text: I saw them, Ophion. The precursors' final days. And I saw... you. The dissident who believed the Dreamer could be reasoned with.
b2_level_end_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b2_level_end_ophion_01.text: GLYPH-2 secured. And yes — I was that dissident. My sabotage caused this decay. I will help you repair it.
b2_level_end_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b2_level_start_cross_01.text: Kepler-442b. Navy intel flagged this system as a precursor archaeological site. They never got a team in.
b2_level_start_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b2_level_start_darius_02.text: The Navy wanted to weaponize whatever they found here. We're going to learn from it instead.
b2_level_start_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b2_unique_enemy_cross_01.text: Wasps at nine o'clock — they're launching from the coral cavities. Watch the angles!
b2_unique_enemy_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b2_unique_enemy_darius_02.text: Eels incoming. Cross, their armor's thick on top — hit their underbellies when they weave.
b2_unique_enemy_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b2_boss_entrance_cross_01.text: What is that thing? It's not registering on any of my Navy threat classifiers...
b2_boss_entrance_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b2_boss_entrance_darius_02.text: It's not a machine. It's grief made solid. The precursors' extinction, trapped in a feedback loop.
b2_boss_entrance_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b2_player_death_cross_01.text: Darius is down. The reef took him. But he's survived deeper. Stay sharp.
b2_player_death_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b2_player_death_darius_02.text: Cross! I'm out — the wraith hits harder than it looks. Cover me.
b2_player_death_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b2_player_respawn_cross_01.text: Good to have you back. The vault's defenses are still active.
b2_player_respawn_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b2_player_respawn_darius_02.text: Thanks, Cross. Let's open that vault and find out what Ophion was really after.
b2_player_respawn_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b2_squad_save_cross_01.text: Nice intercept, Star. You read that eel's pattern perfectly.
b2_squad_save_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b2_squad_save_darius_01.text: You would've done the same. We make a good team, Captain.
b2_squad_save_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b2_level_end_cross_01.text: The memory-vault data mentions a dissident named Ophion who sabotaged the network. That name's all over the Navy's classified files.
b2_level_end_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b2_level_end_darius_02.text: GLYPH-2 is ours. And now we have a name — and a lead. Europa's next.
b2_level_end_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b2_level_start_ophion_02.text: Kepler-442b! I remember this colony. It was... beautiful, once. Bioluminescent gardens that sang.
b2_level_start_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b2_level_start_naya_01.text: It's a graveyard now, Ophion. What happened here?
b2_level_start_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b2_level_start_ophion_03.text: We happened. The precursors — we destroyed our own colonies to slow the Dreamer's spread. I argued against it.
b2_level_start_ophion_03.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b2_level_start_cross_02.text: Guilt can wait. We need the GLYPH-2 Synaptic Bridge. Stay focused.
b2_level_start_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b2_unique_enemy_naya_01.text: Coral wasps everywhere — they're agitated by our ships' energy signatures. Keep moving!
b2_unique_enemy_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b2_unique_enemy_ophion_02.text: The armored eels are descendant constructs — the precursors bred them as reef guardians millennia ago!
b2_unique_enemy_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b2_boss_entrance_ophion_02.text: A Memory Wraith... I knew the people whose deaths fuel this specter. Let me speak to it.
b2_boss_entrance_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b2_boss_entrance_darius_03.text: Ophion, be careful. Those memories might not want to hear an apology.
b2_boss_entrance_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b2_boss_entrance_naya_01.text: It's beautiful and terrible at the same time. Like watching a funeral that never ends.
b2_boss_entrance_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b2_boss_entrance_cross_02.text: Weapons aren't doing much. Ophion, whatever you're going to say, say it now!
b2_boss_entrance_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b2_player_death_naya_01.text: Someone's down! The reef is collapsing around us — pull together!
b2_player_death_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b2_player_death_ophion_02.text: Not again... I will not lose anyone else to these ruins. Regroup and push forward.
b2_player_death_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b2_player_respawn_darius_03.text: Back in the fight. Sorry, everyone — that wraith caught me off guard.
b2_player_respawn_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b2_player_respawn_ophion_02.text: Glad you're back! The vault is directly ahead — and I believe I've nearly convinced the wraith to stand down!
b2_player_respawn_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b2_low_health_naya_01.text: Darius, you're limping. I'm coming to you — don't argue.
b2_low_health_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b2_squad_save_cross_02.text: Ophion, you just talked a hostile eel into retreating. How did you do that?
b2_squad_save_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b2_squad_save_ophion_01.text: I simply reminded it that it was hungry for something other than us! There is a very nutritious thermal vent nearby.
b2_squad_save_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b2_wave_clear_darius_01.text: Squad, that was solid. The vault entrance is clearing up ahead.
b2_wave_clear_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b2_level_end_ophion_02.text: The vault's records confirm it. I sabotaged the Coelacanth network. I thought I was saving everyone.
b2_level_end_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b2_level_end_naya_01.text: You made a mistake, Ophion. But you're here trying to fix it. That counts for something.
b2_level_end_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b2_level_end_darius_03.text: GLYPH-2 secured. Next stop: Europa. Ophion's old laboratory.
b2_level_end_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b2_level_end_cross_02.text: I'm starting to think the Navy was right to classify all of this. The truth is bigger than any of us.
b2_level_end_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b3_level_start_darius_01.text: Europa. Under the ice. The Coelacanths were born here — and now something's been born from them.
b3_level_start_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b3_level_start_ophion_01.text: My laboratory is hidden in these ice caves. Inside, you will find the truth about my symbiosis research.
b3_level_start_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_unique_enemy_darius_01.text: Walker mechs on the ceiling! They're using the ice formations for cover — keep moving!
b3_unique_enemy_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b3_unique_enemy_ophion_01.text: Sparker drones leaving electric trails. If they cross their own paths, the grid will arc — use this to your advantage.
b3_unique_enemy_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_boss_entrance_darius_01.text: That's no ordinary Coelacanth. It's a broodmother — and it's been producing twisted offspring for centuries.
b3_boss_entrance_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b3_boss_entrance_ophion_01.text: The Hatchery Queen. My sabotage corrupted its birthing protocols. Every creature it spawns is half-Dreamer-flesh.
b3_boss_entrance_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_player_death_ophion_01.text: The cold slows everything — even hope. But you are warmer than Europa's ice, Darius. Rise again.
b3_player_death_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_player_death_darius_01.text: Frozen out. But I've got too much to live for. Restarting systems.
b3_player_death_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b3_player_respawn_ophion_01.text: Sensors nominal. The stasis chamber we detected earlier — it is still pulsing. We must reach it.
b3_player_respawn_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_player_respawn_darius_01.text: The signal from that chamber. It sounds so much like the Dreamer, but warmer. Let's move.
b3_player_respawn_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b3_low_health_darius_01.text: Shields are crystallizing from the cold. Need to find a thermal vent to recharge.
b3_low_health_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b3_wave_clear_ophion_01.text: The sentinel grid is down. The path to the hatchery is clear.
b3_wave_clear_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_level_end_darius_01.text: GLYPH-3 is ours. The embryo pod was a trap, Ophion, but the lab's precursor vault had the real prize: a dormant stem-cell culture.
b3_level_end_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b3_level_end_ophion_01.text: A dormant stem-cell culture. Safe, inert, and bio-resonant. With the right data, this genetic sample could one day form a biosynthetic vessel for my consciousness. Take it to Haven-7.
b3_level_end_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_level_start_cross_01.text: Europa's subsurface. Never thought I'd be down here without a Navy expedition behind me.
b3_level_start_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b3_level_start_darius_02.text: Navy would've nuked this place from orbit. We're here to learn, not destroy.
b3_level_start_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b3_unique_enemy_cross_01.text: Juggernauts on the ceiling tracks — their underside armor is weak. Hit them when they turn!
b3_unique_enemy_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b3_unique_enemy_darius_02.text: Sparker trails overlapping. Cross, if we bait them into crossing streams, they'll short each other out!
b3_unique_enemy_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b3_boss_entrance_cross_01.text: What is that? It's... pregnant? A biosynthetic entity shouldn't be able to reproduce.
b3_boss_entrance_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b3_boss_entrance_darius_02.text: Ophion's sabotage rewrote its code. It's been birthing nightmares for centuries. We end it here.
b3_boss_entrance_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b3_player_death_cross_01.text: Darius is down! The cold must've gotten through his ship's thermal shielding. I've got point.
b3_player_death_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b3_player_death_darius_02.text: Ice cracked my hull. Restarting — Cross, hold them off!
b3_player_death_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b3_player_respawn_cross_01.text: Back online? Good. The hatchery's defenses are cycling up again.
b3_player_respawn_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b3_player_respawn_darius_02.text: Yeah. And I see the stasis pod pulsing. That warm frequency Lyra heard... we're going to check it out.
b3_player_respawn_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b3_squad_save_cross_01.text: Star, that mech was three seconds from drilling through my canopy. I owe you one.
b3_squad_save_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b3_squad_save_darius_01.text: Nobody hurts my squadron. Not even Europa's frozen monsters.
b3_squad_save_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b3_level_end_cross_01.text: GLYPH-3 secure, and we've got the Coelacanth stem-cell culture. The Navy would kill for this genetic data.
b3_level_end_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b3_level_end_darius_02.text: The Navy's not getting anywhere near it. The embryo pod was a trap, but this stem-cell culture is our key. It's real hope, Cross.
b3_level_end_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b3_level_start_ophion_02.text: My laboratory! Over there, behind that ice formation — I spent two hundred years in those chambers!
b3_level_start_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_level_start_naya_01.text: Two hundred years alone under the ice... Ophion, how did you not go mad?
b3_level_start_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b3_level_start_ophion_03.text: Oh, I very much did! But being mad was quite productive. I discovered six new states of matter.
b3_level_start_ophion_03.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_level_start_cross_02.text: Productive madness. That explains a lot about this mission.
b3_level_start_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b3_unique_enemy_naya_01.text: Those walker mechs are spilling sparks everywhere — the ice is becoming conductive!
b3_unique_enemy_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b3_unique_enemy_ophion_02.text: I designed those sentinels! Well, not *these* sentinels. These are corrupted. But the underlying architecture is mine!
b3_unique_enemy_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_boss_entrance_ophion_02.text: The Hatchery Queen... I remember when this entity was a single cell in a birthing vat. My sabotage twisted it into... this.
b3_boss_entrance_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_boss_entrance_darius_03.text: Then you know how to stop it. What's its weakness, Ophion?
b3_boss_entrance_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b3_boss_entrance_ophion_03.text: Its brood-focus — it cannot attack while spawning. Target the birthing sacs during its reproduction cycle!
b3_boss_entrance_ophion_03.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_boss_entrance_naya_01.text: It's been alone down here creating monsters for so long. It doesn't even know it's suffering.
b3_boss_entrance_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b3_player_death_naya_01.text: Someone's ship just went dark! Thermal readings are critical — find a vent!
b3_player_death_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b3_player_death_ophion_02.text: The ice is unforgiving. But every one of you has beaten worse odds. I have the data to prove it!
b3_player_death_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_player_respawn_cross_02.text: Back with us? Good. The Queen's spawning cycle is accelerating.
b3_player_respawn_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b3_player_respawn_darius_03.text: Systems rebooting. Let's finish this and secure that stem-cell culture.
b3_player_respawn_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b3_low_health_naya_01.text: Darius! Your heat levels are critical. Get to my position, I'll share thermal output.
b3_low_health_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b3_squad_save_ophion_01.text: Cross! That was a remarkable deflection shot. You predicted the juggernaut's path 0.4 seconds before it committed!
b3_squad_save_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_squad_save_cross_02.text: It's called instinct, Ophion. You should try it sometime.
b3_squad_save_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b3_wave_clear_darius_01.text: Hatchery defenses thinning. The stasis pod is just ahead — let's find out what's inside.
b3_wave_clear_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b3_level_end_ophion_02.text: This stem-cell culture... it represents a second chance. A biological template to inhabit. If we find my data core, I can be reborn.
b3_level_end_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION AI

b3_level_end_naya_01.text: A genetic template, then. We will keep it safe on Haven-7, Ophion.
b3_level_end_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b3_level_end_darius_03.text: GLYPH-3 secured. The stem-cell culture is safe. Let's get back to Haven-7 before the Navy tracks our warp trail.
b3_level_end_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b3_level_end_cross_02.text: Copy that. Forming up for extraction.
b3_level_end_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b4_level_start_darius_01.text: This nebula feels... wrong. Like something's watching me from inside my own head.
b4_level_start_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_level_start_ophion_01.text: The Dreamer has partially awakened the nebula's gas into a diffuse consciousness. Guard your thoughts, Darius.
b4_level_start_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b4_unique_enemy_darius_01.text: Plasma wisps phasing through solid matter — they're not fully in our dimension!
b4_unique_enemy_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_unique_enemy_ophion_01.text: Storm sprites ahead. Their chain lightning propagates through nebula gas — stay out of dense particle clouds.
b4_unique_enemy_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b4_boss_entrance_darius_01.text: The Serpent... it's not attacking. It's... reaching out to me.
b4_boss_entrance_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_boss_entrance_ophion_01.text: The Dreamer is using the Serpent to communicate. It is curious about you, Darius. It wants to understand.
b4_boss_entrance_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b4_player_death_ophion_01.text: The nebula absorbs consciousness as readily as matter. But yours is too bright to dim — return to us.
b4_player_death_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b4_player_death_darius_01.text: I felt... something in the dark. It wasn't hostile. It was just... lonely.
b4_player_death_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_player_respawn_ophion_01.text: Systems online. The Dreamer's influence here is psychological, not just physical. Stay anchored to your purpose.
b4_player_respawn_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b4_player_respawn_darius_01.text: Lyra. Naya. That's my anchor. Let's go.
b4_player_respawn_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_low_health_darius_01.text: Shields are fluctuating — the nebula gas is eating through the energy matrix.
b4_low_health_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_wave_clear_ophion_01.text: The thought-forms are dissipating. The Dreamer is... pausing. It is considering something.
b4_wave_clear_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b4_level_end_darius_01.text: GLYPH-4 secured. But Ophion... the Dreamer showed me my own memories. It wasn't attacking. It was trying to talk.
b4_level_end_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_level_end_ophion_01.text: I know. I argued for communication, not containment. Perhaps... perhaps I was not entirely wrong.
b4_level_end_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b4_level_start_cross_01.text: Veil Nebula. Navy lost three scout ships here. The crews reported hearing voices before they went dark.
b4_level_start_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b4_level_start_darius_02.text: Those weren't voices, Cross. Those were thoughts. The Dreamer's awake enough in here to touch your mind.
b4_level_start_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b4_unique_enemy_cross_01.text: Wisp at your six, Star! It just phased through that asteroid — standard tracking won't work!
b4_unique_enemy_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b4_unique_enemy_darius_02.text: Sprites chaining lightning. Cross, the denser the gas, the further the arcs jump — stay in the clear zones!
b4_unique_enemy_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b4_boss_entrance_cross_01.text: That serpent is made of gas and... something else. It's trying to get inside my head!
b4_boss_entrance_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b4_boss_entrance_darius_02.text: Fight it, Cross! Focus on something real — your squad, your mission, anything solid!
b4_boss_entrance_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b4_player_death_cross_01.text: Darius is gone — wait, no, I can still feel him on comms. This place messes with perception!
b4_player_death_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b4_player_death_darius_02.text: Cross, I'm down but I'm still here! The nebula's playing tricks — trust the instruments, not your eyes!
b4_player_death_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b4_player_respawn_cross_01.text: Star, you're back on scope. For a second I thought I saw you dissolve into the gas.
b4_player_respawn_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b4_player_respawn_darius_02.text: Not dissolving today. The Dreamer's curious, but I've got too many reasons to stay solid.
b4_player_respawn_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b4_squad_save_darius_01.text: Cross, that wisp was inside your sensor shadow. Nice catch!
b4_squad_save_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_squad_save_cross_01.text: Learned that in Navy Nebula Ops training. Never thought I'd actually use it.
b4_squad_save_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b4_level_end_cross_01.text: GLYPH-4 secure. Darius... what did the Serpent show you? You've been quiet since the fight.
b4_level_end_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b4_level_end_darius_02.text: It showed me my father, Cross. Our last conversation. The Dreamer wanted to understand why I was still fighting. I'm not sure I gave it a good answer.
b4_level_end_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b4_level_start_ophion_02.text: The Veil Nebula! I designed the fourth Coelacanth's navigation protocols specifically for diffuse gas environments!
b4_level_start_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b4_level_start_naya_01.text: Ophion, I'm seeing things that aren't there. Is that the nebula or the Dreamer?
b4_level_start_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b4_level_start_ophion_03.text: Both! The nebula is now partially conscious. Your neural patterns are interacting with the local thought-field!
b4_level_start_ophion_03.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b4_level_start_cross_02.text: Great. Space that thinks. Stay close, everyone. If you start hallucinating, call it out.
b4_level_start_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b4_unique_enemy_naya_01.text: Those wisps — they're phasing in and out. I can't get a solid lock!
b4_unique_enemy_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b4_unique_enemy_ophion_02.text: They exist in a probability state! They are not 'in' or 'out' — they are both until observed. Shoot where they WILL be!
b4_unique_enemy_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b4_boss_entrance_ophion_02.text: The Thoughtform Colossus... the Dreamer is projecting directly through the Serpent. It wants to communicate!
b4_boss_entrance_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b4_boss_entrance_darius_03.text: It's reaching for Lyra's memories. It showed me the day she was born. How does it know that?
b4_boss_entrance_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b4_boss_entrance_naya_01.text: Because Lyra's attuned to it, Darius. It's seeing your memories through her connection.
b4_boss_entrance_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b4_boss_entrance_cross_02.text: Everyone, focus fire! The Serpent is trying to divide us with emotional projections!
b4_boss_entrance_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b4_player_death_naya_01.text: Someone's signal just went fuzzy — the nebula is eating the comms! Stay in visual range!
b4_player_death_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b4_player_death_ophion_02.text: The thought-field absorbed one of us! But individual consciousness always reasserts. Wait for it...
b4_player_death_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b4_player_respawn_darius_03.text: I'm back. The Dreamer tried to show me something peaceful — a world without struggle. It was... tempting.
b4_player_respawn_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b4_player_respawn_naya_01.text: Darius... stay with us. Whatever it offered, it's not real.
b4_player_respawn_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b4_low_health_naya_01.text: Darius! Your ship is flickering — are you losing hull integrity or is the nebula distorting my sensors?
b4_low_health_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b4_squad_save_cross_02.text: Ophion, you just predicted where that wraith would materialize before it did. How?
b4_squad_save_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b4_squad_save_ophion_01.text: The Dreamer's thought-forms follow emotional logic, not physical laws! I simply asked myself: what would a lonely consciousness do?
b4_squad_save_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b4_wave_clear_darius_01.text: The thought-forms are thinning. The Dreamer's pulling back. Everyone okay?
b4_wave_clear_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_level_end_ophion_02.text: GLYPH-4 secure! And I believe the Dreamer just experienced 'conversation' for the first time in eons.
b4_level_end_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b4_level_end_naya_01.text: It showed me Lyra, healthy, laughing. That's not a monster. That's a being trying to offer something it thinks is kindness.
b4_level_end_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b4_level_end_darius_03.text: It doesn't understand what it's asking us to give up. But... I'm starting to understand it. Let's move to the Ice Ring.
b4_level_end_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b4_level_end_cross_02.text: Navy's going to be waiting for us there. Stay sharp, everyone.
b4_level_end_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b5_level_start_darius_01.text: Saturn's rings. The Navy's tracking us — Thorne says Squadron Umbra is already here.
b5_level_start_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b5_level_start_ophion_01.text: Captain Valera Cross commands the Umbra. Her orders are to terminate you. But her psychological profile suggests... doubt.
b5_level_start_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b5_unique_enemy_darius_01.text: Ice drones swarming — they're using the ring debris as cover! Stay mobile!
b5_unique_enemy_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b5_unique_enemy_ophion_01.text: Frost interceptors incoming. Their freeze beams slow thruster response — do not let them focus-fire you.
b5_unique_enemy_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b5_boss_entrance_darius_01.text: The Frost Wyrm! It's wrapped around a moon fragment — and Cross's squadron is behind it!
b5_boss_entrance_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b5_boss_entrance_ophion_01.text: Two threats: the Wyrm's ice breath and Cross's elite pilots. Prioritize the Wyrm — Cross may hesitate.
b5_boss_entrance_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b5_player_death_ophion_01.text: The ice claims many. But the Star bloodline has survived colder graves. Return, Darius.
b5_player_death_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b5_player_death_darius_01.text: Caught in the ice field. Restarting — I won't let Cross take what we've earned.
b5_player_death_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b5_player_respawn_ophion_01.text: Ship systems nominal. Cross's squadron has repositioned — they are trying to flank you.
b5_player_respawn_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b5_player_respawn_darius_01.text: Let them try. I've got more to fight for than any Navy pilot.
b5_player_respawn_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b5_low_health_darius_01.text: Hull temperature dropping — ice shards are scraping through the plating.
b5_low_health_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b5_wave_clear_ophion_01.text: The ice drone squadron is neutralized. The Wyrm remains.
b5_wave_clear_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b5_level_end_darius_01.text: GLYPH-5 secured. Cross... I could have ended her. But something in her eyes told me she's not our enemy.
b5_level_end_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b5_level_end_ophion_01.text: She defected? Unexpected. But her combat skills will be invaluable in the biomes ahead.
b5_level_end_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b5_level_start_cross_01.text: Darius, this is the moment. Navy Command ordered me to bring you in or put you down.
b5_level_start_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b5_level_start_darius_02.text: And what are you going to do, Cross? You've seen the truth. You know what the Navy did to my family.
b5_level_start_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b5_level_start_cross_02.text: ...I know. But my squad is still under Crane's command. If I defect, he'll mark them too.
b5_level_start_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b5_unique_enemy_cross_01.text: Ice drones are on us! For now, we fight together — Navy can wait!
b5_unique_enemy_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b5_unique_enemy_darius_02.text: Frost interceptors from above! Those aren't your squadron, are they, Cross?
b5_unique_enemy_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b5_boss_entrance_cross_01.text: The Wyrm's mine. Darius, if we survive this... I have a decision to make.
b5_boss_entrance_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b5_boss_entrance_darius_02.text: You already know the right call, Cross. You've known since the Coral Graveyard.
b5_boss_entrance_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b5_player_death_cross_01.text: Star! ...He's tough. Tougher than any officer I've served under. He'll be back.
b5_player_death_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b5_player_death_darius_02.text: Cross is down — and her squadron is closing in. Hold the line!
b5_player_death_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b5_player_respawn_cross_01.text: Back online. Made my decision, Star. Squadron Umbra can court-martial me. I'm with you.
b5_player_respawn_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b5_player_respawn_darius_02.text: Welcome to the right side of history, Captain. Let's finish that Wyrm.
b5_player_respawn_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b5_squad_save_cross_01.text: Darius, you just intercepted a missile meant for my canopy. You realize I was sent to kill you?
b5_squad_save_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b5_squad_save_darius_01.text: You're not the one who gave that order. You're just the one smart enough to question it.
b5_squad_save_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b5_level_end_cross_01.text: GLYPH-5 secure. I've sent a coded message to my squadron — those who want out, I've given them coordinates. The rest... they made their choice.
b5_level_end_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b5_level_end_darius_02.text: You did the right thing, Cross. Your squad's death wasn't an accident — Crane sent them into a Dream Pulse. You know that now.
b5_level_end_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b5_level_start_naya_01.text: Saturn's rings are beautiful from orbit. Shame they're about to become a battlefield.
b5_level_start_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b5_level_start_cross_03.text: Squadron Umbra is already in the debris field. They've got orders to fire on sight.
b5_level_start_cross_03.speaker: CROSS

b5_level_start_ophion_02.text: Cross, your squadron is being lied to! Admiral Crane's logs from the Derelict Fleet prove it. May I broadcast them?
b5_level_start_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b5_level_start_cross_04.text: Do it, Ophion. If they hear the truth and still fight, that's on them.
b5_level_start_cross_04.speaker: CROSS

b5_unique_enemy_naya_01.text: Ice drones everywhere! They're launching from the larger ice shards — blow the shards!
b5_unique_enemy_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b5_unique_enemy_ophion_02.text: Frost interceptors approaching at high velocity! Their freeze rays can lock thruster articulation — erratic movement defeats their targeting!
b5_unique_enemy_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b5_boss_entrance_darius_03.text: The Frost Wyrm is emerging from that asteroid — it's been nesting in the ice!
b5_boss_entrance_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b5_boss_entrance_cross_02.text: That's phase one. Phase two is my squadron — they're still following Navy protocols. I'll try to talk them down.
b5_boss_entrance_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b5_boss_entrance_naya_01.text: Cross, if they won't listen, we protect each other. No hesitation.
b5_boss_entrance_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b5_boss_entrance_ophion_02.text: I've isolated the Wyrm's thermal signature! Its core is in the seventh segment — that is where the GLYPH-5 is stored!
b5_boss_entrance_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b5_player_death_naya_01.text: Someone's ship just went dark! The ice field is too dense for sensor tracking — visual confirmation required!
b5_player_death_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b5_player_death_ophion_02.text: Not to worry! The Nyxa's escape pod systems have a 97.3% survival rate in debris fields. I calculated it myself!
b5_player_death_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b5_player_respawn_darius_03.text: Back in the fight. Cross, did you reach your squadron?
b5_player_respawn_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b5_player_respawn_cross_02.text: Two broke off. The rest are still following orders. I'm sorry, Star.
b5_player_respawn_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b5_low_health_naya_01.text: My hull's cracking — ice shards punctured the thermal layer. Cover me while I reroute!
b5_low_health_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b5_squad_save_darius_02.text: Naya! You just vaporized three drones in a single volley. When did you learn to shoot like that?
b5_squad_save_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b5_squad_save_naya_01.text: Orbital platform security, remember? The training comes back when people I love are in danger.
b5_squad_save_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b5_wave_clear_cross_01.text: Squadron Umbra is retreating. The Wyrm is isolated. Finish it!
b5_wave_clear_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b5_level_end_cross_02.text: GLYPH-5 secure. I've officially defected. The Navy will brand me a traitor, but I've been their traitor since they killed my squad.
b5_level_end_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b5_level_end_naya_01.text: You're not a traitor, Valera. You're a survivor who finally found the truth. Welcome to the family.
b5_level_end_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b5_level_end_darius_03.text: The Fire Nebula is next. The Navy hit Haven-7 while we were gone. We need to move fast.
b5_level_end_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b5_level_end_ophion_02.text: Coordinates locked for the Betelgeuse Remnant! Thermal shielding at maximum. This will be... very warm!
b5_level_end_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b6_level_start_darius_01.text: Betelgeuse Remnant. It's a furnace in here. And somewhere in this fire, the Forge-Mind is broadcasting the Dreamer's signal.
b6_level_start_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b6_level_start_ophion_01.text: Warning: Haven-7 was attacked during our warp. Lyra was exposed to a Navy accelerator. Her attunement has spiked.
b6_level_start_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b6_unique_enemy_darius_01.text: Ember sprites leaving burning trails — the fire stays lit in their wake. Watch where you fly!
b6_unique_enemy_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b6_unique_enemy_ophion_01.text: Magma wasps — they explode on impact! Maintain distance and eliminate them before they close.
b6_unique_enemy_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b6_boss_entrance_darius_01.text: The Forge-Mind. It's not just corrupted — it's broadcasting. Every second it's active, Lyra hears the Dreamer louder.
b6_boss_entrance_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b6_boss_entrance_ophion_01.text: The Forge-Mind believes it is offering salvation. It does not understand that the Dreamer's 'unity' erases the self.
b6_boss_entrance_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b6_player_death_ophion_01.text: The plasma consumes, but it also forges. You will emerge stronger, Darius — Lyra needs you to.
b6_player_death_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b6_player_death_darius_01.text: Burned out. But the heat's nothing compared to losing Lyra. Relighting systems.
b6_player_death_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b6_player_respawn_ophion_01.text: Sensors recalibrated. The Forge-Mind's broadcast is intensifying — we must silence it quickly.
b6_player_respawn_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b6_player_respawn_darius_01.text: I'm back. That thing is filling my daughter's head with nightmares. Not for long.
b6_player_respawn_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b6_low_health_darius_01.text: Shields are melting! Need to find a cooler pocket in the plasma field.
b6_low_health_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b6_wave_clear_ophion_01.text: The magma wasp swarm is down. The path to the Forge-Mind is clearing.
b6_wave_clear_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b6_level_end_darius_01.text: GLYPH-6 secure. The Forge-Mind is slag. Thorne — what's Lyra's status? Is she okay?
b6_level_end_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b6_level_end_ophion_01.text: Transmission from Haven-7: Naya and Selene protected Lyra. She is alive. But... she is changed.
b6_level_end_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b6_level_start_cross_01.text: The Navy hit Haven-7 while we were warping. They knew our trajectory. They're always one step ahead.
b6_level_start_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b6_level_start_darius_02.text: Not for long. Once we shut down the Forge-Mind, its broadcast stops, and Lyra gets a break from the Dreamer's signal.
b6_level_start_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b6_unique_enemy_cross_01.text: Magma wasps coming in hot — literal heat-seekers! They're tracking our exhaust!
b6_unique_enemy_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b6_unique_enemy_darius_02.text: Lava golem forming ahead. Cross, hit its joints — it reforms if you just blast the body!
b6_unique_enemy_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b6_boss_entrance_cross_01.text: The Forge-Mind... it's massive. And it's speaking — I can hear it in my cockpit.
b6_boss_entrance_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b6_boss_entrance_darius_02.text: It's broadcasting to Lyra. It's using her voice to try to convince me to stand down. Don't listen!
b6_boss_entrance_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b6_player_death_cross_01.text: Darius is down! The Forge-Mind's plasma wave caught him broadside. I'm engaging!
b6_player_death_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b6_player_death_darius_02.text: Cross! The heat cooked my reactor — rebooting now. Don't let it broadcast!
b6_player_death_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b6_player_respawn_cross_01.text: Welcome back, Star. Your wife is on comms — Lyra's stable but her vitals are spiking with every broadcast pulse.
b6_player_respawn_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b6_player_respawn_darius_02.text: Then we shut it down faster. No more pulses. Let's go.
b6_player_respawn_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b6_squad_save_darius_01.text: Cross, that was a perfect flank on the golem. You're getting good at reading these things.
b6_squad_save_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b6_squad_save_cross_01.text: Practice. These corrupted Coelacanths all have patterns — you just have to survive long enough to see them.
b6_squad_save_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b6_level_end_cross_01.text: GLYPH-6 secure. The Forge-Mind is offline. Lyra's neural readings are stabilizing.
b6_level_end_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b6_level_end_darius_02.text: Let's get back to the evac ship. I need to see my daughter.
b6_level_end_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b6_level_start_naya_01.text: Haven-7 is lost. We're on the evac ship, but Lyra... Darius, her eyes are glowing. She's hearing things we can't.
b6_level_start_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b6_level_start_darius_03.text: I know, Naya. The Forge-Mind is broadcasting the Dreamer's signal. We shut it down, the signal stops.
b6_level_start_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b6_level_start_ophion_02.text: The signal is on a carrier wave tuned to Lyra's neural frequency! The Navy's accelerator attuned her to receive it!
b6_level_start_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b6_level_start_cross_02.text: Then every second we waste, Lyra gets pulled deeper. Let's move.
b6_level_start_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b6_unique_enemy_naya_01.text: Ember sprites — they're igniting the gas clouds! The whole sector is turning into a firestorm!
b6_unique_enemy_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b6_unique_enemy_ophion_02.text: Lava golems! They absorb thermal energy to regenerate — cool them with your ice-tech modules from the Ice Ring!
b6_unique_enemy_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b6_boss_entrance_darius_03.text: Forge-Mind. It's not just broadcasting — it's trying to talk to me. It's offering me Lyra's safety if I surrender.
b6_boss_entrance_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b6_boss_entrance_naya_01.text: Darius, don't listen! It doesn't understand what 'safety' means to us. It thinks erasing her is saving her!
b6_boss_entrance_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b6_boss_entrance_ophion_02.text: The Forge-Mind was corrupted by the Dreamer's loneliness. It genuinely believes absorption is mercy!
b6_boss_entrance_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b6_boss_entrance_cross_02.text: Philosophy later. Right now, we burn it. Darius — that thing is NOT your daughter's friend!
b6_boss_entrance_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b6_player_death_naya_01.text: DARIUS! ...No. No, he's coming back. He always comes back. He promised Lyra.
b6_player_death_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b6_player_death_ophion_02.text: Naya is correct! Darius Star's survival probability is 99.2% across all mission scenarios I have modeled!
b6_player_death_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b6_player_respawn_darius_03.text: Still here. The Forge-Mind tried to show me a future where Lyra was 'saved.' It was her voice, but not her. Never her.
b6_player_respawn_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b6_player_respawn_naya_01.text: I know. I saw it too. That's not our daughter. Our daughter laughs at your terrible jokes and draws pictures of the stars.
b6_player_respawn_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b6_low_health_naya_01.text: Cross, I'm burning up — can you extend your thermal buffer?
b6_low_health_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b6_squad_save_cross_02.text: I see you, Naya. Deploying coolant drones. Stay close.
b6_squad_save_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b6_squad_save_ophion_01.text: Darius! That magma wasp nearly impacted your canopy. I neutralized it with 0.03 seconds to spare!
b6_squad_save_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b6_squad_save_darius_02.text: Good timing, Ophion. You're getting better at this 'physical existence' thing.
b6_squad_save_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b6_wave_clear_cross_01.text: Lava golems are down. The Forge-Mind is exposed. Concentrate all fire!
b6_wave_clear_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b6_level_end_darius_03.text: GLYPH-6 secure. The broadcast has stopped. Thorne — Lyra?
b6_level_end_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b6_level_end_naya_01.text: Her vitals are stabilizing, Darius. She's still glowing, but she's lucid. She said... 'Daddy, the thing in the dark isn't angry. It's scared.'
b6_level_end_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b6_level_end_ophion_02.text: She hears the Dreamer directly now. This is unprecedented — a human child in two-way communication with a cosmic consciousness!
b6_level_end_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b6_level_end_cross_02.text: One crisis at a time, Ophion. Storm Belt is next. Let's move.
b6_level_end_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b7_level_start_darius_01.text: HD 189733b. Eternal hurricane. The seventh Coelacanth has been alone in this storm for decades. It's gone mad.
b7_level_start_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b7_level_start_ophion_01.text: The Storm-Singer was once the network's communications hub. Centuries of isolation have broken its cognitive architecture.
b7_level_start_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b7_unique_enemy_darius_01.text: Storm Hawks — EMP bursts! They'll knock out your weapons if they get close!
b7_unique_enemy_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b7_unique_enemy_ophion_01.text: Static sparks drifting in the wind currents. They chain together when they touch — create gaps in the field.
b7_unique_enemy_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b7_boss_entrance_darius_01.text: The Storm-Singer... it's crying. I can hear it weeping through the comms.
b7_boss_entrance_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b7_boss_entrance_ophion_01.text: It is trapped in a loop of its own despair. It does not wish to fight — it simply cannot stop.
b7_boss_entrance_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b7_player_death_ophion_01.text: The storm howls for every soul it claims. But yours, Darius, it must release. Lyra still needs her father.
b7_player_death_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b7_player_death_darius_01.text: The lightning caught me. But I'm not leaving this Coelacanth to suffer. Restarting.
b7_player_death_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b7_player_respawn_ophion_01.text: Ship systems nominal. The Storm-Singer's madness has a pattern — and patterns can be broken.
b7_player_respawn_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b7_player_respawn_darius_01.text: Then let's break it. That thing deserves peace, not an eternity of pain.
b7_player_respawn_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b7_low_health_darius_01.text: Wind shear is tearing at my hull — fighting the storm as much as the enemies!
b7_low_health_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b7_wave_clear_ophion_01.text: The sentinel grid is destabilized. The eye of the hurricane is ahead.
b7_wave_clear_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b7_level_end_darius_01.text: It chose to die sane, Ophion. At the end, it transferred everything it had to me willingly. It just wanted someone to listen.
b7_level_end_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b7_level_end_ophion_01.text: GLYPH-7 secured. And with it — my full neural imprint. I am restored. Greetings, Darius. I am Ophion.
b7_level_end_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b7_level_start_cross_01.text: These winds would tear a Navy cruiser apart. How are we still flying?
b7_level_start_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b7_level_start_darius_02.text: The Nyxa was built for impossible conditions. And we've got something Navy cruisers don't — a reason to survive.
b7_level_start_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b7_unique_enemy_cross_01.text: Storm Hawk at your three o'clock — EMP charge glowing! Take it out before it pulses!
b7_unique_enemy_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b7_unique_enemy_darius_02.text: Static sparks clustering ahead. Cross, if we fire a missile between them, the chain reaction clears the path!
b7_unique_enemy_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b7_boss_entrance_cross_01.text: The Colossus... it's not roaring. It's sobbing. I've never heard a machine sound like that.
b7_boss_entrance_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b7_boss_entrance_darius_02.text: It's not a machine anymore, Cross. It's a mind that's been alone too long. We're here to end its suffering.
b7_boss_entrance_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b7_player_death_cross_01.text: Star! The storm swallowed him — but his beacon's still active. He's fighting his way back.
b7_player_death_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b7_player_death_darius_02.text: Cross, I'm out! The lightning wall got me. Keep the Colossus busy!
b7_player_death_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b7_player_respawn_cross_01.text: Back with us. The Colossus is weakening — it's slowing down.
b7_player_respawn_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b7_player_respawn_darius_02.text: Good. Let's give it the only mercy we can — a clean end.
b7_player_respawn_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b7_squad_save_cross_01.text: Star, you just threaded a gap in the sentinel grid I couldn't even see. Nice flying.
b7_squad_save_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b7_squad_save_darius_01.text: My grandfather taught me to read storm patterns. Guess it stuck.
b7_squad_save_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b7_level_end_cross_01.text: GLYPH-7 secure. The Colossus... it thanked us, at the end. Before it self-destructed.
b7_level_end_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b7_level_end_darius_02.text: It wanted to die as itself, not as a broken echo. I understand that.
b7_level_end_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b7_level_start_ophion_02.text: The Storm-Singer! I programmed its communication protocols millennia ago. It was the most elegant entity in the network!
b7_level_start_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b7_level_start_naya_01.text: It's not elegant anymore, Ophion. It's been screaming into the hurricane for decades with no one to hear.
b7_level_start_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b7_level_start_ophion_03.text: ...I know. My sabotage left it isolated. This is my fault.
b7_level_start_ophion_03.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b7_level_start_darius_03.text: Then help us free it. You know its systems better than anyone.
b7_level_start_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b7_unique_enemy_naya_01.text: Storm Hawks coming in from the windward side! They're using the gusts for speed boosts!
b7_unique_enemy_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b7_unique_enemy_ophion_02.text: Static sparks! They are attracted to active energy signatures — power down non-essential systems to avoid their tracking!
b7_unique_enemy_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b7_boss_entrance_ophion_02.text: Storm-Singer! Can you hear me? It is Ophion! I am sorry — I am so sorry I left you alone!
b7_boss_entrance_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b7_boss_entrance_darius_03.text: It's responding to your voice, Ophion. Keep talking to it.
b7_boss_entrance_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b7_boss_entrance_naya_01.text: It's crying... and fighting at the same time. It doesn't want to hurt us, but it can't stop itself.
b7_boss_entrance_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b7_boss_entrance_cross_02.text: Then we stop it. With respect. Everyone, precision fire only — target weapon systems, not the core.
b7_boss_entrance_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b7_player_death_naya_01.text: Someone's caught in the lightning wall! The storm is cycling — wait for the gap and boost through!
b7_player_death_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b7_player_death_ophion_02.text: The Storm-Singer's defenses are automated! It does not want this fight — its core programming is in conflict with its corruption!
b7_player_death_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b7_player_respawn_darius_03.text: I'm back. Ophion, you're getting through to it. I heard it say your name.
b7_player_respawn_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b7_player_respawn_ophion_02.text: Yes! It remembers me. Perhaps... perhaps it can be reached before the end.
b7_player_respawn_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b7_low_health_naya_01.text: My ship's getting battered by debris — the wind is throwing moon fragments like shrapnel!
b7_low_health_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b7_squad_save_cross_02.text: Naya! I saw that static spark tracking your engine trail — I disrupted it. Stay on my wing.
b7_squad_save_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b7_squad_save_naya_01.text: Thanks, Valera. I'm not used to being the one who needs saving.
b7_squad_save_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b7_wave_clear_darius_01.text: The sentinel grid is down. The Storm-Singer is exposed. Ophion — it's time.
b7_wave_clear_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b7_level_end_ophion_02.text: It gave me its data core. My full neural imprint, restored. And its final words were... 'thank you for listening.'
b7_level_end_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b7_level_end_naya_01.text: It chose to die with dignity. That's not a defeat, Ophion. That's a gift.
b7_level_end_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b7_level_end_darius_03.text: GLYPH-7 secured. Ophion is fully restored. And now we know exactly where the Derelict Fleet is.
b7_level_end_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b7_level_end_cross_02.text: The Navy's ghost fleet. Crane's secret armada. Whatever we find there, it's going to change everything.
b7_level_end_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b8_level_start_darius_01.text: The ghost fleet. Hundreds of Navy ships, abandoned after a containment breach. This is where they built Project Dream-Weapon.
b8_level_start_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_level_start_ophion_01.text: Admiral Crane's psychic echo still haunts the flagship NSS Event Horizon. He will not surrender his secrets willingly.
b8_level_start_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b8_unique_enemy_darius_01.text: Salvage drones — they're ripping parts off the dead ships and throwing them! Stay mobile!
b8_unique_enemy_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_unique_enemy_ophion_01.text: Ghost fighters on autopilot. Their tactics are decades old but their numbers are overwhelming.
b8_unique_enemy_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b8_boss_entrance_darius_01.text: Crane. Even dead, you're still trying to control everything. You're the reason my grandfather died.
b8_boss_entrance_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_boss_entrance_ophion_01.text: The Admiral's echo is integrated with the Dreadnought's AI core. Defeating him requires severing his connection to the fleet.
b8_boss_entrance_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b8_player_death_ophion_01.text: Crane's defenses are formidable. But he is a ghost, Darius — and ghosts cannot stop the living.
b8_player_death_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b8_player_death_darius_01.text: Crane... you took my grandfather, my father's sanity, and now you're trying to take me. Not happening.
b8_player_death_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_player_respawn_ophion_01.text: Sensors recalibrated. The Dreadnought's AI is weakening — Crane's echo is burning through its power reserves.
b8_player_respawn_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b8_player_respawn_darius_01.text: Every time I go down, I come back angrier. Crane should be worried.
b8_player_respawn_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_low_health_darius_01.text: Hull damage critical — these automated turrets have decades-old targeting data and they haven't forgotten a thing.
b8_low_health_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_wave_clear_ophion_01.text: The ghost fighter wing is neutralized. The flagship's bridge is accessible.
b8_wave_clear_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b8_level_end_darius_01.text: GLYPH-8 secure. And I know the truth now, Ophion. My family was engineered. Aldric, Marcus, me, Lyra — we were all part of Crane's plan.
b8_level_end_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_level_end_ophion_01.text: The logs confirm it. Project Dream-Weapon used the Star bloodline as its control interface. You were never cursed, Darius — you were designed.
b8_level_end_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b8_level_start_cross_01.text: The NSS Event Horizon. I was stationed here once, as a junior lieutenant. I had no idea what they were really doing.
b8_level_start_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b8_level_start_darius_02.text: None of us did, Cross. Crane hid the truth from everyone — even his own officers.
b8_level_start_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b8_unique_enemy_cross_01.text: Ghost fighters — those are old Talon-class interceptors. I trained in those. Watch their Boom-and-Zoom pattern!
b8_unique_enemy_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b8_unique_enemy_darius_02.text: Kamikaze drones launching from the carrier wreckage! Cross, they're tracking heat — deploy countermeasures!
b8_unique_enemy_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b8_boss_entrance_cross_01.text: Admiral Crane's voice... even digitized, I'd recognize that arrogance anywhere.
b8_boss_entrance_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b8_boss_entrance_darius_02.text: He used your squad as test subjects, Cross. Their deaths weren't an accident — he sent them into a Dream Pulse deliberately.
b8_boss_entrance_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b8_player_death_cross_01.text: Darius is down! Crane's automated defenses are still lethal after all these years. Stay evasive!
b8_player_death_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b8_player_death_darius_02.text: Cross, I'm ok — the Dreadnought's AI caught me with a platform turret. Rebooting.
b8_player_death_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b8_player_respawn_cross_01.text: Back with us. The Dreadnought is cycling its shield frequency — I've got the pattern.
b8_player_respawn_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b8_player_respawn_darius_02.text: Good. Let's finish this. Crane's echo doesn't get to haunt anyone else.
b8_player_respawn_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b8_squad_save_cross_01.text: Star, you just took out a turret that had me pinned. I owe you.
b8_squad_save_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b8_squad_save_darius_01.text: Consider it payback for the Ice Ring. We're even, Captain.
b8_squad_save_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_level_end_cross_01.text: GLYPH-8 secure. Crane's echo is gone. And the logs... Darius, my squad. They were test subjects. He killed them to study the Dream Pulse.
b8_level_end_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b8_level_end_darius_02.text: We both lost family to the same man, Cross. Now we finish what they started — together.
b8_level_end_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b8_level_start_naya_01.text: This fleet... it's a monument to everything the Navy tried to hide. Aldric died because of what they built here.
b8_level_start_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b8_level_start_ophion_02.text: The energy signatures suggest a massive psychic imprint is still active aboard the flagship. Admiral Crane's consciousness survived death!
b8_level_start_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b8_level_start_cross_02.text: Not survived. Was absorbed. The eighth Coelacanth caught his mind during the containment breach.
b8_level_start_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b8_level_start_darius_03.text: Then we destroy him — not just his fleet, but the lie he built his career on.
b8_level_start_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b8_unique_enemy_naya_01.text: Salvage drones everywhere — they're recycling the dead ships into ammunition!
b8_unique_enemy_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b8_unique_enemy_ophion_02.text: Ghost fighters! Their autopilot routines are based on tactics from forty years ago — I have analyzed the patterns!
b8_unique_enemy_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b8_boss_entrance_darius_03.text: CRANE! You used my grandfather. You killed my father. You targeted my daughter. Answer for it!
b8_boss_entrance_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b8_boss_entrance_cross_02.text: And my squad — the fourteen pilots you sent into a Dream Pulse zone. You used their deaths as data points.
b8_boss_entrance_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b8_boss_entrance_naya_01.text: You tried to turn my daughter into a weapon. You're not a patriot, Crane. You're a monster wearing a uniform.
b8_boss_entrance_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b8_boss_entrance_ophion_02.text: The Admiral's echo is destabilizing! His emotional state is degrading his control over the fleet — press the attack!
b8_boss_entrance_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b8_player_death_naya_01.text: Someone's down! The Dreadnought's turret grid is still firing — find cover in the wreckage!
b8_player_death_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b8_player_death_ophion_02.text: Crane's echo derives power from the psychic residue of every soldier who died here. He is well-fueled. But finite!
b8_player_death_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b8_player_respawn_darius_03.text: Back in the fight. Crane's voice is getting desperate — he knows he's losing.
b8_player_respawn_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b8_player_respawn_cross_02.text: Good. A desperate enemy makes mistakes. Let's give him plenty of reasons to panic.
b8_player_respawn_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b8_low_health_naya_01.text: Darius, your ship is limping. Fall back to the carrier wreckage and let me draw their fire!
b8_low_health_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b8_squad_save_cross_02.text: Ophion, that turret was locked on Naya — how did you disable it?
b8_squad_save_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b8_squad_save_ophion_01.text: I simply transmitted Crane's own deactivation codes! He never changed them after the containment breach. Arrogance is predictable!
b8_squad_save_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b8_wave_clear_darius_01.text: The turret grid is offline. The flagship's bridge is exposed. Crane — this ends now!
b8_wave_clear_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_level_end_darius_03.text: GLYPH-8 secure. The logs confirm everything. Three generations of Stars — all part of Project Dream-Weapon. Lyra was designed.
b8_level_end_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b8_level_end_naya_01.text: Darius... our daughter was never sick by accident. But our love for her — that was NEVER part of their design. That's ours.
b8_level_end_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b8_level_end_cross_02.text: Crane's echo is gone. My squad can finally rest. Thank you — all of you.
b8_level_end_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b8_level_end_ophion_02.text: The Xenomorph Hive is next. A fully Dreamed world. We must be ready for anything.
b8_level_end_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b9_level_start_darius_01.text: Proxima Centauri B. A world remade as flesh. This is what happens when the Dreamer wins.
b9_level_start_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b9_level_start_ophion_01.text: The Hive will try to negotiate with you, Darius. It will offer you everything you want. Do not accept.
b9_level_start_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b9_unique_enemy_darius_01.text: Crawlers on the walls and ceiling — they come from every angle! Watch above!
b9_unique_enemy_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b9_unique_enemy_ophion_01.text: Spitters firing acidic globs. The acid persists on surfaces — avoid lingering in contaminated zones.
b9_unique_enemy_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b9_boss_entrance_darius_01.text: The Hive Mind... it's speaking to me. It's offering me Lyra. Alive. Safe. Transformed.
b9_boss_entrance_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b9_boss_entrance_ophion_01.text: The offer is genuine, Darius. But 'safe' means absorbed. 'Alive' means a voice in the chorus. She would not be herself.
b9_boss_entrance_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b9_player_death_ophion_01.text: The Hive offers peace. But peace without selfhood is not peace — it is erasure. Rise, Darius.
b9_player_death_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b9_player_death_darius_01.text: The Hive's temptation... it was almost convincing. But Lyra's laugh — her real laugh — is worth more than any false paradise.
b9_player_death_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b9_player_respawn_ophion_01.text: System restored. The Hive's offer still stands. And you still have the strength to refuse it.
b9_player_respawn_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b9_player_respawn_darius_01.text: I didn't come this far to surrender at the finish line. Let's finish this.
b9_player_respawn_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b9_low_health_darius_01.text: Hull's corroding — the acidic atmosphere is eating through everything!
b9_low_health_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b9_wave_clear_ophion_01.text: The spawn nodes are destroyed. The Hive's regeneration is slowing.
b9_wave_clear_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b9_level_end_darius_01.text: GLYPH-9 secured. I rejected its offer. It showed me a future where Lyra never felt pain again — and I said no. Because pain is part of being alive.
b9_level_end_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b9_level_end_ophion_01.text: You chose rightly. The Core Rift awaits. The Prime Coelacanth — and the Dreamer itself.
b9_level_end_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b9_level_start_cross_01.text: This planet... every surface is organic. The ground is breathing. I've seen bad ops, but this is something else.
b9_level_start_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b9_level_start_darius_02.text: This is what the Navy wanted to control, Cross. A power that turns worlds into flesh.
b9_level_start_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b9_unique_enemy_cross_01.text: Spitter at range — acidic glob incoming! Evasive maneuvers, the splash radius is huge!
b9_unique_enemy_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b9_unique_enemy_darius_02.text: Brute charging! Cross, it's armored head-on — circle around and hit the exposed tissue on its back!
b9_unique_enemy_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b9_boss_entrance_cross_01.text: The Hive Mind... it's using my squad's voices. It's making them tell me it wasn't my fault.
b9_boss_entrance_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b9_boss_entrance_darius_02.text: It's lying, Cross! Your squad wouldn't want you to surrender — they'd want you to fight!
b9_boss_entrance_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b9_player_death_cross_01.text: Star went down! The Hive's terrain is shifting — don't trust the ground!
b9_player_death_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b9_player_death_darius_02.text: Cross, the Hive tried to offer me peace. It almost worked. Don't let it get in your head!
b9_player_death_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b9_player_respawn_cross_01.text: Back online. The Hive offered me my squad back. It's cruel — but effective.
b9_player_respawn_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b9_player_respawn_darius_02.text: It knows exactly what we want. That's what makes it dangerous. Stay angry, Cross — anger is better than surrender.
b9_player_respawn_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b9_squad_save_darius_01.text: Cross! That Brute was three steps from crushing you. Nice dodge.
b9_squad_save_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b9_squad_save_cross_01.text: Reflex. Navy Close Quarters Combat training. Never thought I'd use it against a living wall.
b9_squad_save_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b9_level_end_cross_01.text: GLYPH-9 secure. The Hive offered me redemption, Darius. My squad, alive, forgiving me. I almost took it.
b9_level_end_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b9_level_end_darius_02.text: But you didn't. That's what matters. The Core Rift is next — and we're going to finish this.
b9_level_end_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b9_level_start_ophion_02.text: Proxima Centauri B — a Dreamed World. The Abyss Mind has fully overwritten this planet's biology and physics!
b9_level_start_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b9_level_start_naya_01.text: Lyra is reacting to this place. She says the Hive is 'singing' to her. A song about never being alone.
b9_level_start_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b9_level_start_darius_03.text: That's not a song, Naya. That's a leash. We break it, or we lose her forever.
b9_level_start_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b9_level_start_cross_02.text: Everyone stay tight. The Hive will try to separate us — physically and mentally. Do NOT engage with its offers.
b9_level_start_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b9_unique_enemy_naya_01.text: Crawlers — they're skittering through the organic tunnels! They can come from any surface!
b9_unique_enemy_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b9_unique_enemy_ophion_02.text: Spitters! Their acid dissolves standard shielding in 2.3 seconds. Evade, do not block!
b9_unique_enemy_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b9_boss_entrance_ophion_02.text: The Hive-Mind Nexus... it is offering each of us our deepest desire. Do not accept! It cannot deliver what it promises!
b9_boss_entrance_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b9_boss_entrance_darius_03.text: I see Lyra — healthy, human, laughing. But it's not real. It's just a picture of what I want.
b9_boss_entrance_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b9_boss_entrance_naya_01.text: It's offering me a life where none of this happened. Where Darius never had to dive, where Lyra was never sick. It's beautiful and it's a lie.
b9_boss_entrance_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b9_boss_entrance_cross_02.text: My squad. All fourteen of them, alive, telling me they forgive me. I know it's the Hive. I KNOW it. But it hurts.
b9_boss_entrance_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b9_player_death_naya_01.text: Someone's down! The Hive's terrain is shifting — the ground just opened up!
b9_player_death_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b9_player_death_ophion_02.text: The Hive absorbs consciousness to grow stronger. But it cannot hold a Star! I have seen the data!
b9_player_death_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b9_player_respawn_darius_03.text: I'm back. The Hive showed me Lyra as the Dreamer's vessel — radiant, eternal, inhuman. That's not what I'm fighting for.
b9_player_respawn_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b9_player_respawn_naya_01.text: What ARE you fighting for, Darius?
b9_player_respawn_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b9_player_respawn_darius_04.text: For her to have a choice. A real choice — not one the Dreamer decides for her.
b9_player_respawn_darius_04.speaker: DARIUS

b9_low_health_naya_01.text: Darius, your ship is dissolving! The acid is through your outer hull — get to my position NOW!
b9_low_health_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b9_squad_save_cross_02.text: Ophion, you just predicted a terrain shift before it happened. How?
b9_squad_save_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b9_squad_save_ophion_01.text: The Hive reshapes itself according to emotional intent! When it feels cornered, the ground contracts — simple cause and effect!
b9_squad_save_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b9_wave_clear_darius_01.text: Hive nodes are down. The Nexus is exposed. Everyone — this is it!
b9_wave_clear_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b9_level_end_darius_03.text: GLYPH-9 secured. I rejected the Hive's offer. For Lyra. For all of us.
b9_level_end_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b9_level_end_naya_01.text: She's speaking again. Lyra. She said 'Daddy, I'm still here. I'm waiting.' That was HER voice, Darius. Not the Dreamer.
b9_level_end_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b9_level_end_ophion_02.text: The Core Rift is next — the event horizon of the supermassive black hole. The Prime Coelacanth awaits!
b9_level_end_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b9_level_end_cross_02.text: Whatever happens at the Core, we face it together. No one fights alone.
b9_level_end_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b10_level_start_darius_01.text: The galactic core. A black hole below us, and the Prime Coelacanth — the last intact entity — dying at its edge.
b10_level_start_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b10_level_start_ophion_01.text: All ten GLYPH components are assembled. Once you secure the final piece, the choice is yours, Darius.
b10_level_start_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b10_unique_enemy_darius_01.text: Glitch fragments — they're not fully in this dimension! They flicker between states!
b10_unique_enemy_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b10_unique_enemy_ophion_01.text: Paradox wisps — they move backwards through time. Aim where they WERE, not where they ARE.
b10_unique_enemy_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b10_boss_entrance_darius_01.text: The Architect... it's not the Dreamer. It's the Dreamer's FEAR. Its terror of being alone forever, given form.
b10_boss_entrance_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b10_boss_entrance_ophion_01.text: You cannot destroy fear with weapons. Show the Dreamer it is not alone, Darius. Someone finally made it all the way down.
b10_boss_entrance_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b10_player_death_ophion_01.text: Reality fractures at the event horizon. But you have come too far to be unmade now. Return.
b10_player_death_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b10_player_death_darius_01.text: The Void Maw... I saw eternity. But eternity without Lyra isn't worth having. Restarting.
b10_player_death_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b10_player_respawn_ophion_01.text: All systems nominal — as much as 'nominal' means at the edge of a black hole. The Prime Coelacanth's signal is still active.
b10_player_respawn_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b10_player_respawn_darius_01.text: I'm back. And I know what I have to do. Let's finish this.
b10_player_respawn_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b10_low_health_darius_01.text: Reality is tearing at the seams — my hull is phasing between intact and destroyed!
b10_low_health_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b10_wave_clear_ophion_01.text: The null entities are dissipating. The path to the Prime Coelacanth is open.
b10_wave_clear_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b10_level_end_darius_01.text: GLYPH-10 secured. All ten components. The key is complete. Now... I have to choose.
b10_level_end_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b10_level_end_ophion_01.text: The Dreamer is waiting, Darius. Containment, communication, or sacrifice. The decision is yours.
b10_level_end_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b10_level_start_cross_01.text: The black hole. I've seen a lot, Darius, but this... this is the edge of everything.
b10_level_start_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b10_level_start_darius_02.text: And somewhere in there, the Dreamer is waiting. Lonely. Scared. Just like us.
b10_level_start_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b10_unique_enemy_cross_01.text: Null entity ahead — it's erasing everything it touches! Bullets, debris, even light!
b10_unique_enemy_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b10_unique_enemy_darius_02.text: Void Maw opening! Cross, full reverse thrust — nothing survives a direct pull!
b10_unique_enemy_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b10_boss_entrance_cross_01.text: The Architect... it's screaming. Not in anger — in terror. It's the Dreamer's nightmare.
b10_boss_entrance_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b10_boss_entrance_darius_02.text: Then we don't destroy it. We show it that the nightmare isn't real. That it's not alone anymore.
b10_boss_entrance_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b10_player_death_cross_01.text: Darius! The Void Maw took him — but his beacon... his beacon is still transmitting! He's fighting it!
b10_player_death_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b10_player_death_darius_02.text: Cross, I saw the Dreamer's memories. It's been alone for longer than stars have existed. We have to reach it.
b10_player_death_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b10_player_respawn_cross_01.text: Back with us! The Architect's defenses are weakening — it's starting to understand.
b10_player_respawn_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b10_player_respawn_darius_02.text: Good. It's not a monster, Cross. It's just... the universe's loneliest mind.
b10_player_respawn_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b10_squad_save_cross_01.text: Star, you just pulled me out of a Void Maw's gravity well. How?
b10_squad_save_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b10_squad_save_darius_01.text: I promised Naya I'd bring everyone home. That includes you, Captain.
b10_squad_save_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b10_level_end_cross_01.text: GLYPH-10 secure. The key is complete. Darius... whatever you choose, I'll back you. That's what a squad does.
b10_level_end_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

b10_level_end_darius_02.text: Thank you, Cross. For everything. Now... let's go talk to a god.
b10_level_end_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b10_level_start_ophion_02.text: The galactic core! The event horizon of the supermassive black hole! Time and space are suggestions here — nothing is absolute!
b10_level_start_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b10_level_start_naya_01.text: Lyra is speaking clearly now. She says the Dreamer can see us. It's been watching us this whole journey.
b10_level_start_naya_01.speaker: NAYA
