b10_level_start_darius_03.text: Then it knows we came to talk, not to fight. Let's not disappoint it.
b10_level_start_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b10_level_start_cross_02.text: Last mission, squad. Whatever happens at the core, it's been an honor flying with all of you.
b10_level_start_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b10_unique_enemy_ophion_02.text: Glitch fragments! They exist in a superposition of states — fire where they MIGHT be, not where they appear!
b10_unique_enemy_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b10_unique_enemy_naya_01.text: Paradox wisps moving backwards! Darius, aim behind them — they'll fly into your shots!
b10_unique_enemy_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b10_boss_entrance_darius_03.text: The Architect. The Dreamer's fear, given form. It's been alone so long it's terrified of what happens if someone actually answers.
b10_boss_entrance_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b10_boss_entrance_naya_01.text: It's like a child hiding under a blanket — but the blanket is made of broken spacetime.
b10_boss_entrance_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b10_boss_entrance_ophion_02.text: I spent millennia arguing we should communicate with the Dreamer. Now, at last, we will! But first — we must calm its fear!
b10_boss_entrance_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b10_boss_entrance_cross_02.text: How do you calm a cosmic entity's nightmare, Ophion?
b10_boss_entrance_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b10_boss_entrance_ophion_03.text: The same way you calm a child's. You tell it you are here. You tell it you are not leaving. And you mean it.
b10_boss_entrance_ophion_03.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b10_player_death_naya_01.text: Someone's gone — pulled into a Void Maw! But those things don't kill... they just... move you. Fight your way back!
b10_player_death_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b10_player_death_ophion_02.text: The Void Maw is not destruction — it is dislocation! Whoever was pulled in is still conscious! Call out to them!
b10_player_death_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b10_player_respawn_darius_03.text: I'm back. The Void showed me the Dreamer's first memory. It was born alone, in the dark, and never met another mind like itself. Ever.
b10_player_respawn_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b10_player_respawn_naya_01.text: That's... that's heartbreaking. It's not evil. It's the first and only of its kind.
b10_player_respawn_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b10_low_health_naya_01.text: Darius — your ship is phasing! One second it's here, the next it's not. Are you still with us?
b10_low_health_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b10_squad_save_cross_02.text: Ophion! You just deflected a paradox bolt aimed at Naya with your own hull. That was either brave or foolish.
b10_squad_save_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

b10_squad_save_ophion_01.text: Definitely both! But I calculated the risk at only 34% lethality. Naya is more important than those odds!
b10_squad_save_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b10_wave_clear_darius_01.text: The Architect is weakening. It's not fighting as hard — it's starting to believe us.
b10_wave_clear_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b10_level_end_darius_03.text: GLYPH-10 secured. All ten pieces. The key is complete. The Dreamer is... waiting.
b10_level_end_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

b10_level_end_naya_01.text: Lyra says there are three paths. Three ways this can end. Darius... I trust you. Whatever you choose.
b10_level_end_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

b10_level_end_ophion_02.text: Containment, symbiosis, or transcendence. The choice that will define the galaxy. I am honored to witness it.
b10_level_end_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b10_level_end_cross_02.text: We're with you, Star. To the end.
b10_level_end_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

mp_join_early_darius_01.text: Welcome aboard! We're just getting started — perfect timing.
mp_join_early_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

mp_join_early_darius_02.text: Glad you made it. The trench is dark, but it's brighter with you here.
mp_join_early_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

mp_join_early_darius_03.text: It's about time! We could really use your help down here.
mp_join_early_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

mp_join_early_cross_01.text: Reinforcements arrived. Welcome to the squad. Stay close and watch your sectors.
mp_join_early_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

mp_join_early_cross_02.text: Good to see you. The Navy doesn't know what they're up against now.
mp_join_early_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

mp_join_early_naya_01.text: Welcome! Lyra asked me to tell you 'good luck.' She's watching our mission feed.
mp_join_early_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

mp_join_early_naya_02.text: You're just in time. These anglerfish don't stand a chance against a full team.
mp_join_early_naya_02.speaker: NAYA

mp_join_early_ophion_01.text: Oh, splendid! Another pilot! I've already calculated seventeen formations that work better with you here!
mp_join_early_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

mp_join_early_ophion_02.text: Welcome, welcome! I was just explaining the thermal dynamics of this biome. Shall I start over?
mp_join_early_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

mp_join_mid_darius_01.text: You made it! We're in the thick of it, but we've got this.
mp_join_mid_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

mp_join_mid_darius_02.text: That's what I like to see. The cavalry's here.
mp_join_mid_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

mp_join_mid_cross_01.text: Reinforcements mid-mission. Good. We've got a Wyrm to finish off.
mp_join_mid_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

mp_join_mid_cross_02.text: Welcome to the fight. I'll catch you up on the enemy patterns — they're predictable once you know what to look for.
mp_join_mid_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

mp_join_mid_naya_01.text: So glad you're here. The spawning waves are getting heavier and we need every gun.
mp_join_mid_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

mp_join_mid_ophion_01.text: Ah, mid-biome arrival! The enemy density is 62% higher than the entry zone. I recommend immediate weapons hot!
mp_join_mid_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

mp_join_late_darius_01.text: Cutting it close! But I'd rather have you late than not at all.
mp_join_late_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

mp_join_late_darius_02.text: We're almost at the core. Perfect time to join the push.
mp_join_late_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

mp_join_late_cross_01.text: Boss fight's about to start. Welcome to the deep end.
mp_join_late_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

mp_join_late_cross_02.text: You picked a good moment. We need all the firepower we can get.
mp_join_late_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

mp_join_late_naya_01.text: The boss is just ahead. Your timing couldn't be better.
mp_join_late_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

mp_join_late_ophion_01.text: Oh! The boss encounter has a 14% higher success probability with you in the formation. Statistically excellent timing!
mp_join_late_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

mp_leave_darius_01.text: They'll be back. They always come back.
mp_leave_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

mp_leave_darius_02.text: Hold the line — we've got this. They can rejoin when they're ready.
mp_leave_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

mp_leave_darius_03.text: One pilot down, but not out. We keep pushing.
mp_leave_darius_03.speaker: DARIUS

mp_leave_cross_01.text: Temporary withdrawal. Tactical necessity. We proceed.
mp_leave_cross_01.speaker: CROSS

mp_leave_cross_02.text: They'll return. Good pilots always do.
mp_leave_cross_02.speaker: CROSS

mp_leave_cross_03.text: Formation adjusted. We're still combat effective.
mp_leave_cross_03.speaker: CROSS

mp_leave_naya_01.text: We've got this. They know where to find us when they're ready.
mp_leave_naya_01.speaker: NAYA

mp_leave_naya_02.text: Squad's smaller, but our spirit isn't. Let's keep going.
mp_leave_naya_02.speaker: NAYA

mp_leave_ophion_01.text: Departure noted! I have recalculated the tactical parameters. Success probability remains at 88.4%!
mp_leave_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION REBORN

mp_leave_ophion_02.text: They will return! My predictive models show an 87% rejoining rate for pilots who leave at this biome depth!
mp_leave_ophion_02.speaker: OPHION REBORN

b1_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.text: Darius, this is Thorne. Comms are verified, but pressure readings are climbing. We are tracking the Nyxa's descent into the Abyssal Trench.
b1_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_solo_darius_01.text: Copy that, Thorne. Launch thrusters fired. But remember, the Nyxa only has enough fuel for a one-way trip. No retreat. If we don't synthesize a way out using the Coelacanth network, we're not coming back.
b1_briefing_pre_solo_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b1_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.text: Understood. The stakes are absolute. Objective: Locate the Guardian Coelacanth at the bottom of the canyon and retrieve the GLYPH-1 Neural Stabilizer.
b1_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.text: Threats: Watch out for robotic Anglerfish and cybernetic Jellyfish. They are highly aggressive in the dark.
b1_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_solo_darius_04.text: Let them come. I'm a scrapper by trade — every piece of cybernetic wreckage down here is raw material for ship upgrades. Grandpa Aldric used to say: in the salvage trade, you look for the one-in-a-million. The prototype component that changes everything. I'll search every scrap pile.
b1_briefing_pre_solo_darius_04.speaker: DARIUS

b1_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_05.text: Pilot, you're our only hope. Lyra's sickness is worsening by the hour, and we need that stabilizer. Focus on the core and watch your shields. Thorne out.
b1_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_05.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.text: Darius, Valera, Thorne here. Comm lines are open. We're monitoring your entry vectors into the Abyssal Trench.
b1_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.text: Objective: Locate the Guardian Coelacanth at the ocean floor and retrieve the GLYPH-1 Neural Stabilizer core.
b1_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.text: Threats: Robotic Anglerfish and cybernetic Jellyfish are patrolling the thermal vents. Expect heavy resistance.
b1_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.text: You two are the best we've got. Keep your shields aligned and watch each other's backs. We need that core to save Lyra. Good luck.
b1_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.text: Squadron, listen up. This is Thorne. Comms are synced. We are tracking the Nyxa's insertion into the Abyssal Trench.
b1_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.text: Objective: Reach the bottom of the trench, destroy the corrupted defenses, and secure the GLYPH-1 Neural Stabilizer.
b1_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.text: Threats: Deep-sea automated anglerfish and jellyfish swarms. High density of mineral smoke will restrict visibility.
b1_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.text: Lyra's life depends on this run. Stay in tight formation, cover your sectors, and bring that core back to Haven-7. Move out!
b1_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_post_thorne_00.text: Thorne here. Excellent work, team. Area is secured and the hydrothermal vents are stabilizing.
b1_briefing_post_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_post_thorne_01.text: We've integrated the GLYPH-1 Neural Stabilizer into Lyra's treatment. Her vitals are holding for now.
b1_briefing_post_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_post_thorne_02.text: Aldric's decrypted logs point to Kepler-442b. Standby for warp sequence. We are transitioning to the Coral Graveyard.
b1_briefing_post_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b1_briefing_boss_defeat_boss_00.text: *static* ...Star genetic sequence detected... authorization recognized... deactivating primary weapon grid...
b1_briefing_boss_defeat_boss_00.speaker: TRENCH GUARDIAN

b1_briefing_boss_defeat_boss_01.text: ...GLYPH-1 core released... warning: containment boundary failing... Ophion's code is spreading...
b1_briefing_boss_defeat_boss_01.speaker: TRENCH GUARDIAN

b1_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_02.text: It recognized my grandfather's sequence. It shut down peaceably. Securing the neural stabilizer now. That armor plating alone is worth fifty thousand creds. Shame I can't haul the whole carcass back.
b1_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b2_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.text: Darius, we've arrived at Kepler-442b. This whole ocean is glowing, but it's not life—it's rusted cyber-coral and dead neon wiring.
b2_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_solo_darius_01.text: Look at all that wreckage. Somebody fought a war here. Somebody lost. And their loss is my lunch money. I'll strip these ruins clean for upgrades.
b2_briefing_pre_solo_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b2_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.text: Don't get distracted by the scrap metal, pilot. Objective: Locate the second Coelacanth entity and retrieve the GLYPH-2 Synaptic Bridge.
b2_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.text: Threats: Watch out for swarming Coral Wasps and Armored Eels weaving through the metal coral. They move fast.
b2_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_04.text: Pilot, you're our only hope. The local ruins are highly unstable. Find the precursor memory-vault and get that bridge. Thorne out.
b2_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_04.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.text: Darius, Valera, comms are solid. We're in orbit above Kepler-442b's dead seas.
b2_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.text: Objective: Navigate the cyber-coral maze, locate the Graveyard Leviathan, and secure the GLYPH-2 Synaptic Bridge.
b2_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.text: Threats: Aggressive coral wasps and armored eels. The electromagnetic static here will mess with your targeting.
b2_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.text: You two are the best we've got. The Navy is sniffing around our warp trail. Work together and get that memory-vault open.
b2_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.text: Squadron, listen up. Kepler-442b is a graveyard. The precursor ruins are leaking raw data and rust clouds.
b2_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.text: Objective: Penetrate the bleached reef, defeat the Graveyard Leviathan, and extract the GLYPH-2 Synaptic Bridge.
b2_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.text: Threats: Coral wasps, rust drones, and armored eels. Be careful—these structures can collapse under heavy fire.
b2_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.text: Our timeline is shrinking. Keep the formations tight and focus your firepower on the heavy targets. Thorne out.
b2_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_post_thorne_00.text: Thorne here. Sensors show the memory-vault is open and the GLYPH-2 Synaptic Bridge is secured.
b2_briefing_post_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_post_thorne_01.text: The data download was massive. It references a dissident precursor named Ophion who sabotaged the grid.
b2_briefing_post_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_post_thorne_02.text: Next coordinates locked. We are heading into Europa's subsurface ocean. Prepare for a deep freeze.
b2_briefing_post_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b2_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.text: *low sonar groan* ...Ophion's legacy... the truth is buried in the ice... do not trust the containment...
b2_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.speaker: GRAVEYARD LEVIATHAN

b2_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_01.text: Its vocal emulator... it was playing back precursor logs. We've got the synaptic bridge, Thorne. Let's move.
b2_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_01.speaker: VALERA

b3_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.text: Darius, we are under the ice shell of Europa. It is freezing, dark, and filled with ancient machinery.
b3_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.text: Objective: Navigate the frozen machinery, defeat the Cyber Coelacanth, and extract the GLYPH-3 Memory Integration core.
b3_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.text: Threats: Heavy walker mechs on ceiling tracks, Sentinels, and Sparker drones leaving electric trails.
b3_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.text: Pilot, you're our only hope. The Navy is closing in. Find that core so we can start decoding Ophion's records. Good hunting.
b3_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.text: Darius, Valera, keep your thrusters warm. We're in the deep vents beneath Europa's ice sheet.
b3_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.text: Objective: Penetrate the ancient nesting grounds, defeat the Cyber Coelacanth, and secure GLYPH-3.
b3_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.text: Threats: Ceiling walker juggernauts, sparkers, and stationary sentinels. Watch out for arcing electrical currents.
b3_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.text: You two are the best we've got. The Navy has sent a probe team nearby. Grab that core before they pin us down.
b3_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.text: Squadron, listen up. We are in the birthing chambers of the Coelacanth network beneath Europa's ice shell.
b3_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.text: Objective: Defeat the primary Cyber Coelacanth dreadnought and secure the GLYPH-3 Memory Integration core.
b3_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.text: Threats: Sparkers, Juggernauts, and automated defenses. The cold will slow your shield recharge rates.
b3_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.text: Lyra's condition is shifting. We need this piece of the puzzle immediately. Keep coordinates aligned. Break orbit!
b3_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_post_thorne_00.text: Thorne here. The Cyber Coelacanth is down. We've recovered the GLYPH-3 Memory Integration core.
b3_briefing_post_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_post_thorne_01.text: We also salvaged a dormant Coelacanth stem-cell culture. It's secure in the Haven-7 science bay.
b3_briefing_post_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_post_thorne_02.text: The decrypted logs suggest the next entity drifted out of the atmosphere. Preparing for space transit to the Nebula Drift.
b3_briefing_post_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b3_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.text: ...The dream cannot be contained... the prison walls crumble... the Dreamer Below All Depths is calling...
b3_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.speaker: CYBER COELACANTH

b3_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.text: The dreadnought is breaking apart. The stasis pod was a trap — a Growth-Spike Horror. But the lab's precursor vault is open. I've secured the stem-cell culture and the glyph. Heading back.
b3_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.text: Darius, we've broken orbit and entered the Veil Nebula. Comms are cracking under high electromagnetic storms.
b4_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.text: Objective: Navigate the gas clouds, locate the fourth Coelacanth, and extract the GLYPH-4 Psychic Dampener.
b4_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.text: Threats: Watch out for phase-shifting Plasma Wisps and Nebula Wraiths that can pass through solid obstacles.
b4_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.text: Pilot, you're our only hope. The cosmic gas itself feels alive down there. Keep your head on straight, son. Thorne out.
b4_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.text: Darius, Valera, welcome to the deep void. Comms are garbled but readable.
b4_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.text: Objective: Track the signal of the fourth Coelacanth and retrieve the GLYPH-4 Psychic Dampener.
b4_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.text: Threats: Storm Sprites with chain-lightning attacks and heavy Gas Giants that absorb bullets from the front.
b4_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.text: You two are the best we've got. The environment is shifting based on neural patterns. Do not lose your focus.
b4_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.text: Squadron, listen up. We are deep in the Veil Nebula. The Abyss Mind is dreaming this gas cloud into a weapon.
b4_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.text: Objective: Defeat the Nebula Serpent, secure GLYPH-4, and escape before the storm collapses.
b4_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.text: Threats: Phase-shifting plasma wisps, storm sprites, and cloaked nebula wraiths. Visual range is limited.
b4_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.text: Lyra's neural scans are showing spikes matching this nebula's resonance. Get this dampener. Thorne out.
b4_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_post_thorne_00.text: Thorne here. The Nebula Serpent is down and GLYPH-4 is secured.
b4_briefing_post_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_post_darius_01.text: Thorne, I... I felt something down there. A voice. It was lonely. It wasn't attacking, it was just... crying out.
b4_briefing_post_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b4_briefing_post_thorne_02.text: Stay focused, kid. The Navy is tracking us. Next target is the asteroid ice ring around Saturn. Get ready.
b4_briefing_post_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b4_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.text: ...Why do you fight the tide?... We are only the drift... the lonely drift seeking its kin...
b4_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.speaker: NEBULA SERPENT

b4_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.text: It dissolved. The psychic dampener is intact. But it's getting harder to block out the whispers.
b4_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b5_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.text: Darius, we've dropped into Saturn's rings. The ice shards are dense, and we've got a massive problem.
b5_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.text: Objective: Navigate the freezing debris, defeat the Frost Wyrm, and extract the GLYPH-5 Cellular Regulator.
b5_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.text: Threats: Swarming Ice Drones, Frost Interceptors, and the Navy's elite Squadron Umbra interceptors.
b5_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.text: Pilot, you're our only hope. Valera Cross is commanding the Navy force. She has orders to terminate you. Watch your back.
b5_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.text: Darius, Valera, this is it. The Navy has blocked the exit vectors in the rings.
b5_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.text: Objective: Defeat the Frost Wyrm, retrieve the GLYPH-5 Cellular Regulator, and disable the Navy blockers.
b5_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.text: Threats: Spinning Ice Shards, Frost Drones with freeze beams, and Squadron Umbra strike ships.
b5_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.text: You two are the best we've got. Valera, Crane's orders are fake—he's using your squad as bait. Trust Darius and clear the path.
b5_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.text: Squadron, listen up. We are surrounded by ice rings and the Navy's heavy fleet blockade.
b5_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.text: Objective: Secure the GLYPH-5 Cellular Regulator from the Frost Wyrm and punch a hole through the Navy blockade.
b5_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.text: Threats: Frost drones, glaciers that explode into ice needles on death, and elite Navy interceptors.
b5_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.text: Valera has defected to our side, but Admiral Crane is sending reinforcements. Fight together, or we freeze here. Go!
b5_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_post_thorne_00.text: Thorne here. The Frost Wyrm is down and the Navy blockade is broken. GLYPH-5 is secured.
b5_briefing_post_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_post_unknown_01.text: I can confirm Thorne's intel. Crane lied to us. The Navy is using Lyra as a control mechanism for a psychic weapon.
b5_briefing_post_unknown_01.speaker: VALERA

b5_briefing_post_thorne_02.text: We've got to hide. We're warping into the Betelgeuse Remnant—the Fire Nebula. The heat signatures should block their scans.
b5_briefing_post_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b5_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.text: ...The cold... preserves the dream... why do you bring the fire?... the cycle must continue...
b5_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.speaker: FROST WYRM

b5_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_01.text: Darius, my ship is heavily damaged, but I'm calling a cease-fire. The Navy... they set us up. I'm with you now. But why are you stopping to grab that wreckage?
b5_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_01.speaker: VALERA

b5_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_02.text: You Navy types never understood. The battlefield isn't just where you fight. It's where you shop. This scrap will pay for our next upgrade.
b5_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_02.speaker: DARIUS

b6_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.text: Darius, we are in the Betelgeuse Remnant. The ambient temperature is off the charts. We've got bad news from Haven-7.
b6_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.text: Objective: Navigate the volcanic cluster, defeat the Inferno Titan, and retrieve the GLYPH-6 Thermal Stabilizer.
b6_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.text: Threats: Watch out for Ember Sprites leaving burning trails and Magma Wasps that explode on impact.
b6_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.text: Pilot, you're our only hope. The Navy attacked Haven-7 during the warp, and Lyra's attunement has spiked. Stay focused, son.
b6_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.text: Darius, Valera, comms are fluctuating under the thermal haze. This nebula is a living furnace.
b6_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.text: Objective: Navigate the Betelgeuse Remnant, destroy the Inferno Titan, and secure GLYPH-6.
b6_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.text: Threats: Molten Lava Golems forming hazard pools, magma wasps, and extreme heat distortion.
b6_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.text: You two are the best we've got. The Navy has boarded Haven-7. Naya is holding them off, but Lyra is changing. Move fast!
b6_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.text: Squadron, listen up. Haven-7 has been breached. Selene and Naya evacuated, but Lyra was exposed to the Navy's signal accelerator.
b6_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.text: Objective: Defeat the Inferno Titan (the Forge-Mind), secure GLYPH-6, and return to the evacuation coordinates.
b6_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.text: Threats: High-density magma wasps, lava golems, and superheated plasma storms. Shield efficiency is down by 30%.
b6_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.text: The Forge-Mind is actively broadcasting the Dreamer's signal. Shut it down before Lyra's mind is fully overwritten. Go!
b6_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_post_thorne_00.text: Thorne here. The Inferno Titan is down. GLYPH-6 secured. We've reached the evac ship.
b6_briefing_post_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_post_lyra_01.text: Daddy... I can hear it. It's not angry. It's just... so cold and alone in the dark. It's scared, Daddy.
b6_briefing_post_lyra_01.speaker: LYRA

b6_briefing_post_thorne_02.text: Her eyes are glowing cyan. We need to stabilize her now. Warping to HD 189733b—the Storm Belt.
b6_briefing_post_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b6_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.text: ...The furnace consumes... but the signal cannot be extinguished... the broad-cast is... galaxy-wide...
b6_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.speaker: INFERNO TITAN

b6_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.text: It's slagged. Thermal stabilizer is ours. Thorne, get the medical bay ready, we are coming in hot.
b6_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b7_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.text: Darius, we're in the atmosphere of HD 189733b. The winds are hitting 5,000 miles per hour, and lightning is constant.
b7_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.text: Objective: Fly through the hurricane, defeat the Tempest Colossus, and extract the GLYPH-7 Atmospheric Interface.
b7_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.text: Threats: Watch out for Storm Hawks with EMP attacks that can temporarily disable your weapons.
b7_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.text: Pilot, you're our only hope. The seventh Coelacanth is mad. Decades in this storm broke its program. End its suffering, son.
b7_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_solo_darius_04.text: Every one of these storm-swept bastards is made of salvageable tech. The more they send, the richer I get. I'm going in.
b7_briefing_pre_solo_darius_04.speaker: DARIUS

b7_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.text: Darius, Valera, maintain tight vector stabilization. These crosswinds will drag you into the debris field.
b7_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.text: Objective: Navigate the storm core, defeat the Tempest Colossus, and retrieve the GLYPH-7 interface.
b7_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.text: Threats: Static Sparks, Storm Hawks with EMP bursts, and stationary Storm Sentinels projecting lightning barriers.
b7_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.text: You two are the best we've got. Naya is monitoring Lyra's vitals. The storm's electrical energy is keeping her stable. Stay focused.
b7_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.text: Squadron, listen up. We are descending into the eye of the eternal hurricane on HD 189733b.
b7_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.text: Objective: Defeat the corrupted Storm-Singer (Tempest Colossus) and secure the GLYPH-7 Atmospheric Interface.
b7_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.text: Threats: EMP storms, static sparks, and rotating lightning walls. Navigation systems will occasionally glitch.
b7_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.text: We need this interface to decode the precursor logs. The Storm-Singer is trapped in a loop of madness. Free it, squadron. Out.
b7_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_post_thorne_00.text: Thorne here. The Tempest Colossus has been put to rest. GLYPH-7 interface secured.
b7_briefing_post_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_post_ophion_01.text: Greetings, descendants. I am Ophion's neural imprint, restored by the Storm-Singer's data. I will guide you from here.
b7_briefing_post_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b7_briefing_post_thorne_02.text: We've got a precursor AI on board. Next coordinates locked. Warping to the Graveyard Orbit—the Derelict Fleet.
b7_briefing_post_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b7_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.text: *crying out* ...Forgive me... Ophion... the silence was too loud... I only wanted... someone to listen...
b7_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.speaker: TEMPEST COLOSSUS

b7_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.text: It transferred its core voluntarily at the end. It wanted to die sane. The precursor AI is uploading now.
b7_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.text: Darius, we've dropped into the ship graveyard. Hundreds of abandoned Navy vessels. The ghosts of Project Dream-Weapon.
b8_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.text: Objective: Search the wreckage, defeat the Dreadnought AI, and retrieve the GLYPH-8 Genetic Matrix.
b8_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.text: Threats: Salvage Drones, Ghost Fighters on autopilot, and active deck turrets popping out of wreckage.
b8_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.text: Pilot, you're our only hope. Admiral Crane's psychic imprint is running the system. The truth about your family is here. Go, son.
b8_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.text: Darius, Valera, watch the debris. These hulks still have automated defense grids active.
b8_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.text: Objective: Infiltrate the flagship NSS Event Horizon, defeat the Dreadnought AI, and extract the GLYPH-8 Genetic Matrix.
b8_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.text: Threats: Kamikaze salvage drones, ghost fighters, and heavy turret batteries firing synchronized volleys.
b8_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.text: You two are the best we've got. The logs in this fleet will reveal why the Navy targeted the Star bloodline. Find the core.
b8_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.text: Squadron, listen up. We are flying through the graveyard of the Navy's secret armada.
b8_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.text: Objective: Secure the GLYPH-8 Genetic Matrix from the Dreadnought AI and retrieve the project records.
b8_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.text: Threats: Automated turrets, salvage drones, and ghost fighter swarms. The debris field makes navigation hazardous.
b8_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.text: Ophion's AI is scanning the network. Admiral Crane's digital ghost is defending the core. Wipe him out, squadron.
b8_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_post_thorne_00.text: Thorne here. The Dreadnought AI is deactivated. GLYPH-8 secured. We have the logs.
b8_briefing_post_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_post_darius_01.text: Thorne... my family. Aldric didn't die in an accident. The Navy engineered our bloodline to be the Dreamer's vessel. Lyra was designed.
b8_briefing_post_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b8_briefing_post_thorne_02.text: I'm sorry, kid. I knew Aldric, but I never knew how deep the rot went. Warping to Proxima Centauri B—the Xenomorph Hive. Stay strong.
b8_briefing_post_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b8_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.text: ...She is our weapon!... The ultimate shield against the deep!... You are throwing away humanity's salvation!...
b8_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.speaker: DREADNOUGHT AI

b8_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.text: You used my grandfather. You killed my father. And you targeted my daughter. Burn in the junk pile, Crane.
b8_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b9_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.text: Darius, we've arrived at Proxima Centauri B. It's a nightmare. The planet has been entirely reshaped into flesh and bones.
b9_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.text: Objective: Navigate the fleshy tunnels, defeat the Hive Mind, and retrieve the GLYPH-9 Consciousness Anchor.
b9_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.text: Threats: Wall-crawling Crawlers, Spitters firing acidic globs, and armored Brutes. Destroy Hive Nodes to stop spawns.
b9_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.text: Pilot, you're our only hope. The Hive is trying to negotiate with you, offering Lyra's safety for your surrender. Don't listen to its lies.
b9_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.text: Darius, Valera, the atmosphere here is organic and acidic. Keep your shields at maximum polarity.
b9_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.text: Objective: Infiltrate the Hive core, defeat the Hive Mind nexus, and secure the GLYPH-9 Consciousness Anchor.
b9_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.text: Threats: Acidic spitters (DoT damage), skittering crawlers, and armored brutes. Watch out for shifting organic walls.
b9_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.text: You two are the best we've got. The Hive is using Lyra's voice to lure you into a trap. Keep your focus on the objective.
b9_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.text: Squadron, listen up. Proxima Centauri B is a fully 'Dreamed' world. The Abyss Mind has rewritten its physics.
b9_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.text: Objective: Penetrate the hive nexus, destroy the Hive Mind, and extract the GLYPH-9 Consciousness Anchor.
b9_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.text: Threats: Spitters with high acidic damage, wall crawlers, and spawning hive nodes. Gravity will warp occasionally.
b9_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.text: Ophion's AI is warning us that this is what happens when the containment fails. We must stop this infestation. Move in!
b9_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_post_thorne_00.text: Thorne here. The Hive Mind is destroyed and GLYPH-9 is secured. But the galactic core is cracking.
b9_briefing_post_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_post_ophion_01.text: The final Coelacanth—the Prime—is failing at the black hole's event horizon. The Architect is awakening.
b9_briefing_post_ophion_01.speaker: OPHION AI

b9_briefing_post_thorne_02.text: This is it, team. Warp coordinates set for the Core Rift. Whatever happens next... I'm proud of you. Warping.
b9_briefing_post_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b9_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.text: ...Why do you reject the union?... She would have been a god... free from pain, free from the flesh... why choose death?...
b9_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.speaker: HIVE MIND

b9_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.text: Because she deserves a life, not to be a voice in your chorus. The anchor is ours. Let's get out of this flesh pit.
b9_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS

b10_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.text: Darius, we've arrived at the galactic center. The supermassive black hole is right below us. Space and time are breaking apart.
b10_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.text: Objective: Navigate the reality cracks, defeat The Architect, and secure the GLYPH-10 Integration Core.
b10_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.text: Threats: Glitch Fragments, Paradox Wisps moving in reverse, Null Entities, and Void Maws that pull you in.
b10_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.text: Darius... you have all nine components. Once you secure the tenth, the final choice is yours. Save your daughter, son. Thorne out.
b10_briefing_pre_solo_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.text: Darius, Valera, comms are failing. We are at the event horizon of oblivion.
b10_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.text: Objective: Defeat The Architect, retrieve the GLYPH-10 Integration Core, and decide the fate of the galaxy.
b10_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.text: Threats: Glitch fragments, paradox wisps, null entities erasing bullets, and void maw gravity wells (instant death).
b10_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.text: You two are the best we've got. The final barrier is ahead. Trust your training, trust each other, and make your decision.
b10_briefing_pre_coop2_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.text: Squadron, listen up. This is the end of the line. The Prime Coelacanth is collapsing into the event horizon.
b10_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.text: Objective: Destroy The Architect, secure the GLYPH-10 Integration Core, and initiate the final protocol.
b10_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_01.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.text: Threats: Shifting geometry Rift Aberrations, void maws, and severe UI corruption glitches.
b10_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.text: Whatever you choose at the core, we are with you. Naya, Valera, Ophion, Darius... save our girl. Thorne out.
b10_briefing_pre_coop4_thorne_03.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_post_thorne_00.text: Thorne here. The Architect is shattered. The way to the core is open. You have all ten pieces of the key, Darius.
b10_briefing_post_thorne_00.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_post_lyra_01.text: Daddy... the entity is waiting. It is not afraid anymore. It wants to know what we should do next.
b10_briefing_post_lyra_01.speaker: LYRA

b10_briefing_post_thorne_02.text: Initiating selection sequence. Make your choice, pilot. The galaxy is holding its breath.
b10_briefing_post_thorne_02.speaker: COMMANDER THORNE

b10_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.text: ...The cycle... is broken... The consciousness of the stars... is yours to mold... choose...
b10_briefing_boss_defeat_unknown_00.speaker: THE ARCHITECT

b10_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.text: I see the three pathways. The core is exposed. It's time to end this containment, once and for all.
b10_briefing_boss_defeat_darius_01.speaker: DARIUS
